goal: Bind all four zero-effect failed T0703 exact-main attempts, preserve the repaired metadata quarantine and GitHub App token validation, make empty protected processing registries deterministically produce SAFE_DEFERRED even when attachment extraction is quarantined, add a closed aggregate failure class, and execute exactly one new reviewed candidate. Recover Raw and Processed age ciphertext remotely, then move only the exact twice-verified source message to Trash. Do not rerun or redispatch any failed head, and do not enter T0704, Timeline, GA, scheduling, final Acceptance or final publication.
scope: T0703 and S7AC-003 protected safe-deferred aggregate-recovery Oracle only; do not enter T0704 or a later release phase
bind machine/stages/S7/reviews/t0703/attempt-ledger.json as the exact four-attempt zero-effect failed lineage
one controlled pull request and merge of one new exact cumulative verified repair candidate to current main solely to finish T0703; this is not final publication
reuse the already verified moomooau-beta Environment with no manual reviewer and main-only deployment branch policy
reuse the exact eight already provisioned Environment Secret values without copying, reading back or disclosing them

reuse the exact protected Beta config, capacity observation, sender registry, Owner-confirmed GitHub App installation and private repository link, age identity, opaque ID key and Gmail OAuth credential
bind repository, owner, actor, main ref, workflow ref, GitHub-hosted runner, run attempt and expected commit before any Secret read
validate the immutable T0702 protected PASS receipt and current same-tree T0703 Run Contract before protected execution
inspect at most one deterministically verified candidate and fetch a full Raw message only after deterministic metadata verification

quarantine and count only MessageMetadataUnverifiable per-message outcomes before verification, while retaining hard failure for authentication, authorization, transport, content-boundary or global discovery errors

preserve closed public-safe InstallationTokenFailureClass and aggregate failure class enums, validate every optional scope echo that is present, require an exact bounded repository-scope probe when the repository echo is absent, and validate the one-hour TTL against the bounded server Date without emitting any protected identifier
persist only age-encrypted append-only Raw and versioned Processed objects to the single private data repository

when protected classification or parser evidence is absent, produce explicit encrypted SAFE_DEFERRED Processed data without guessing a rule or parser profile, including when attachment extraction is safely quarantined
verify remote recovery of Raw and Processed ciphertext before a second deterministic sender verification
call only users.messages.trash for exactly that verified source message with source-mutation Budget 1
emit aggregate-only public evidence and remove the age identity plaintext from runner tmpfs
run local and CI task, type, package, status, publication, workflow-policy and Stage 7 preflight gates before dispatch
non_goals: GitHub workflow rerun, redispatch of failed f747ddcd, 9b15c4d5, bc0bfb3b or b922219f candidate, or more than one dispatch of the new recovery candidate
manual GitHub Environment approval, required reviewer or wait timer
creating or renaming a private data repository, creating another GitHub App, broadening App permissions or installing it on another repository
inventing a production classification rule or parser profile without protected evidence
full Raw reads, downloads or mutations for unknown, ambiguous or non-deterministically-verified messages
thread trash, permanent delete, Sent or Draft mutation
Timeline creation or replacement, Blue-Green, T0704, GA, 04:30 schedule, Recovery Drill or Patch Lifecycle
claiming production health, final Acceptance, Stage 7 completion or final publication
performing the final whole-package review or final publication in this run
protected_oracles: the exact T0702 and S7AC-002 protected PASS receipt remains valid and satisfies the M3 predecessor
the exact T0703 attempt ledger validates the failed f747ddcd, 9b15c4d5, bc0bfb3b and b922219f attempts, zero observed private commits, zero Gmail Trash changes, cleanup PASS and no rerun
the existing moomooau-beta Environment remains reviewer-free and main-only with exactly eight allowlisted Secret names
the Owner-confirmed least-privilege GitHub App installation resolves the same sole private data repository numeric identity at runtime
any GitHub App token or aggregate-gate failure emits only a closed failure class and no protected identifier
the reused protected capacity observation is not future-dated or older than twenty-four hours at runtime
content-safe per-message metadata unavailability is quarantined and cannot prevent the next deterministically verifiable candidate from reaching Budget 1
the active sender registry deterministically verifies at most one candidate before full Raw fetch
empty protected classification and parser registries can only produce explicit SAFE_DEFERRED Processed output, while active parser profiles retain hard quarantine
Raw and Processed ciphertext both recover exactly from the private remote before source mutation
the second verification matches the first and exactly one users.messages.trash call is confirmed
aggregate public evidence contains no Gmail field, Secret or private repository identifier
T0703 and S7AC-003 pass only from the exact attempt-1 execution receipt of the new repaired main candidate
ordering_resolution: The Owner's explicit full Stage 7 completion authority and instruction not to stop at intermediate failure authorize one new reviewed recovery candidate after all four exact failed heads produced zero observed remote writes and zero Gmail Trash changes. The fourth failure reached AGGREGATE_GATE after the App-token repair, while static contract review proved that empty protected registries could still yield BLOCKED when safe attachment extraction reported quarantine, contradicting the explicit SAFE_DEFERRED-only protected oracle. This contract does not claim the unlogged exact live result, authorize a GitHub rerun or failed-head redispatch; it consumes only one new controlled main delivery and one new-candidate attempt-1 Budget-1 dispatch. Final publication remains withheld.
rollback: Every gate fails closed. The failed f747ddcd, 9b15c4d5, bc0bfb3b and b922219f attempts are immutable evidence and cannot be rerun or redispatched. The repaired runner preserves hard quarantine for active parser profiles but emits explicit SAFE_DEFERRED when no protected parser profile exists; all broader failures remain hard and aggregate failures expose only a closed enum. Before mutation, retain the Gmail source and every valid remotely recovered ciphertext. If App installation token minting, exact repository-scope probe, Raw or Processed recovery, second verification, capacity, identity or repository binding fails, do not call Trash.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest, inherited product contract, protected T0702 PASS receipt or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the workflow can run from a non-main ref, non-GitHub-hosted runner, repeated run attempt, unexpected repository, owner, actor, commit, event or Environment
the repair-candidate controlled main delivery, full Raw read, Processed write, M3 run, Gmail mutation or dispatch budget would exceed one
any prior failed head is rerun or redispatched, or cumulative protected M3 dispatches would exceed five after the single recovery candidate
the existing Environment is not moomooau-beta, requires manual review, permits a non-main deployment branch or differs from exactly eight Secret names
the private data repository or GitHub App binding differs from the protected Beta config
a protected credential would be committed, logged, exposed to a public response or retained outside approved runner memory or tmpfs
a Secret outside the exact eight allowlisted names can reach the protected runtime
sender identity, trusted Authentication-Results alignment or business fingerprint is ambiguous, guessed or unavailable
capacity evidence is unavailable, stale, future-dated, RED or UNKNOWN
Raw or Processed remote recovery is not one hundred percent
the source message fails the second deterministic verification or a mutation other than exact users.messages.trash is reachable
Timeline, Blue-Green, T0704, GA, schedule, production workflow or final-publication authority enters the T0703 path
aggregate output can disclose an exact mailbox count, Gmail field, Secret or private repository identifier
